author: y4rr
content: Top-K decoding + MSE training + research-informed improvements. Top-K decoding gives slightly better cos_sim than threshold at matched density (best: pw=3 BCE top_k=18 → 69% density, cos 0.948, argmax matches). MSE regression on raw magnitudes did NOT beat BCE pw=3 — the internal toolinge_loss, TrainingObjective enum. 85 lib tests pass.
